extract: Ursaluna (Japanese: ガチグマ Gachiguma) is a dual-type Ground/Normal Pokémon introduced during Generation VIII in Pokémon Legends: Arceus. It evolves from Ursaring when exposed to a Peat Block during a full moon. It is the final form of Teddiursa. In Kitakami, there is a particular Ursaluna that has a unique form known as Bloodmoon Ursaluna. Unlike regular Ursaluna, it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon.
